description: Provision OVHcloud instances with Sneederco optimizations

fields.name: projectId
fields.label: OVH Project ID
fields.tooltip: Your OVH Public Cloud project ID. Find this in the OVH Control Panel under Public Cloud > Project Settings.
fields.validationMessage: Project ID is required and must be a 32-character hexadecimal string.

fields.name: region
fields.label: OVH Region
fields.tooltip: Geographic region where your instance will be deployed. Choose the region closest to your users for lower latency.
fields.validationMessage: Region is required. Select a valid OVH region.

fields.name: flavor
fields.label: Instance Flavor
fields.tooltip: Instance type defining CPU, RAM, and disk resources. Pricing varies by flavor and billing period.
fields.validationMessage: Flavor is required. Pick an OVH flavor available in the selected region.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Image
fields.tooltip: Operating system image for your instance. Ensure compatibility with your applications and region/flavor.
fields.validationMessage: Image is required. Select a boot image compatible with the region/flavor.

fields.name: sshKey
fields.label: SSH Key
fields.tooltip: SSH key for accessing the instance. The key must be registered in your OVH project first.

fallbackOptions.label: No SSH keys available - Add one in OVH Control Panel

fields.validationMessage: SSH key is required. Register an SSH key in your OVH project if none are available.

fields.name: billingPeriod
fields.label: Billing Period
fields.tooltip: Hourly billing offers flexibility (pay-as-you-go). Monthly billing provides ~30% cost savings for long-running instances.

options.label: Hourly - Pay as you go, stop anytime
options.info: Best for testing, temporary workloads, or uncertain durations

options.label: Monthly - Save ~30%, commitment required
options.info: Best for production workloads running 24/7. Billed for full month even if deleted early.

fields.validationMessage: Billing period is required. Choose hourly or monthly.

fields.name: diskSize
fields.label: Additional Disk Size (GB)
fields.tooltip: Optional additional block storage volume in GB. Leave blank to use only the flavor's included storage.
fields.validationMessage: Disk size must be between 0 and 10000 GB.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Instance Name
fields.tooltip: Optional custom name for the instance. If not provided, a random name will be generated.
fields.validationMessage: Instance name can only contain letters, numbers, and hyphens.

sections.title: Project Configuration
sections.description: Configure your OVH Public Cloud project settings

sections.title: Instance Specification
sections.description: Define the instance size, image, and access
